title: 16 Pieces Poinsettia Christmas Decorations,Glitter Artificial Poinsettia Flowers Christmas Tree Ornaments,for New Year Wedding Xmas Wreath Home Party Decor (Red and Green)
features: BEAUTIFUL DESIGN:The diameter of the poinsettia is about 14.5cm/5.7 inches, there is a pole at the bottom that can fix the flower, and each poinsettia has glittering petals. After receiving the product, please put it in an outdoor ventilated place; please check whether the size is suitable before purchasing; open the package, the glitter flower will fall, just shake it gently, it will not affect the use.

MATERIAL:The Christmas flower decorations are made of flexible, non-fragile material, which can be pasted anywhere at will, and the surface is covered with glitter to make the Christmas tree more attractive, these flowers may be compressed and deformed, you can adjust them into formal shape.
EASY TO USE: Just insert the pole into the Christmas flower base tube and stick it anywhere you like. You can use them to decorate your home and meet various needs in your daily life.

APPLICABLE OCCASIONS: Our Christmas tree decorations are suitable for many occasions, and can be used to decorate Christmas trees, homes, tables, Christmas wreaths, Christmas gift boxes, fireplaces, walls, offices, shops, hotels and other places you want.
AS A CHRISTMAS GIFT: You can prepare poinsettia ornaments for yourself, or give them as gifts to your friends, family, relatives, colleagues, classmates, relatives, roommates, etc.
description: Product Description Pecehom 16 Packs Flowers for Christmas Tree Decorations, Fake Poinsettia Artificial Flowers for Decoration Make Your Christmas Stands Out! Wide Occasions: Christmas tree decoration and ornaments, Christmas garland , wreath, Xmas party holiday decoration, dinner table centerpieces, holiday floral arrangement, wedding flowers, bouquets, holiday flower centerpieces, wedding backdrops, and much more! ✔ Exquisite Christmas Poinsettia Flowers Decorations For Home Tree,5 Colors To Choose From, Silver, Gold, Black And White, Black And Red, Red And Green Christmas Flowers, You Can'T Miss It! ✔ Christmas Flower Decorations Also Great as Christmas Craft Suppliers, DIY Your Own Christmas Wreath Garland and Even Gifts Decor! ✔ Small Tips for Your Better Experience Shake off extra glitter & air the smell before using. Adjust petal's place for better decorative effect while using.
